ops.title: gws (Google Workspace CLI) output quirks that break naive scripting — banner line, bare ids, saturating estimates
ops.body: `gws` prints a `Using keyring backend: keyring` banner ahead of its JSON output, which breaks naive `jq` pipes (worse with `2>&1`) — strip it first (`grep '^{'`). `gmail users messages list` returns bare `{id, threadId}` pairs only, and `resultSizeEstimate` saturates near the page size (~501 at maxResults 500), so paginated counts via `--page-all` are the only trustworthy totals. For getaway work prefer `gog`: probes (2026-07-12) showed identical result counts on identical queries, and gog adds the lockdown flags and `--wrap-untrusted`.
